headings.usage: All section titles, hero text, car names. Uppercase preferred for top-level headers.

grid_system.bento_hero: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 md:gap-6 auto-rows-[minmax(200px,auto)]

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFD100] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 rounded-sm hover:bg-[#E6BC00] transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#333] text-white font-medium uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 rounded-sm hover:border-[#FFD100] hover:text-[#FFD100] transition-all duration-300

cards.vehicle: bg-[#111] border border-[#222] rounded-sm overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#FFD100]/50 transition-all duration-300
cards.feature: bg-[#111] p-8 border border-[#222] rounded-sm hover:bg-[#161616] transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#333] text-white p-4 rounded-sm focus:border-[#FFD100] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FFD100] outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-white/30

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5

hero_background.description: Dark BMW studio shot for immersive hero background

featured_sport.description: Red sports car for 'Featured Vehicles' section

interior_detail.description: Leather interior macro shot for 'Quality Promise' section

dealership_night.description: Modern dealership building at night for Contact page

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Implement a 'Dark Mode Only' luxury aesthetic. Use the provided image URLs. Do not use gradients for backgrounds, only solid #0A0A0A. Use the yellow accent sparingly for maximum impact (CTAs, active states).

pages.home: Full-screen hero with the BMW image. Text overlay: 'DESTOCKAGE FLOTTE HERTZ' in Oswald font. CTA: 'DÉCOUVRIR LE CATALOGUE'. Section 2: 'Pourquoi Hertz Pro?' with 3 columns (Quality, Price, Warranty).
pages.catalogue: Sidebar filter (left) + Grid (right). Cards should be minimal: Image + Model Name (Bold) + Price (Yellow) + Mileage (Grey).
pages.vehicle_detail: Split layout. Left: Large Gallery. Right: Sticky 'Buy Box' with price and CTA. Below: Tabbed specs (Characteristics, Equipment, Maintenance).
pages.contact: Split layout. Left: Contact Form. Right: Dealership Image with overlay map info.

tech_stack_specifics.tailwind: Use 'class' strategy for dark mode (force dark). Configure 'font-oswald' and 'font-manrope' in tailwind.config.js.
tech_stack_specifics.shadcn: Customize all Shadcn components to match the dark theme. Remove rounded corners (set radius to 0.2rem or 0). Set borders to #333.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
